speaker: MATT
raw_text: Awesome. All right. So as the months go by and you all have your individual adventures, as you converse and talk amongst yourselves, the date of Winter's Crest begins to creep up. Now, Winter's Crest is a day that's really only celebrated in Tal'Dorei proper-- occasionally by people in other places who migrated away from Tal'Dorei, but the event that it's based around, Eravon the Ice Lord, was specific to Tal'Dorei. It's not celebrated everywhere in the world. However, it is coming up, and you all decided to celebrate your Winter's Crest festival this year, not in Tal'Dorei. You all instead made your way towards the Bay of Gifts, in Marquet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sneaky sneak!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You made a broom?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You know we have a fucking flying carpet?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Now we have two brooms. We can leave those fuckers in the dust!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's pretty fucking cool. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You really have no money left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am out of money. I have a teeny bit left. But I also bought some other things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's now going to become Whitestone's FedEx though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we all getting any prezzies?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you back? You were gone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, is that the end of that?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And I wrote. A lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just a lot of writing, and I'm probably halfway through that book by now.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I don't know what those are. All right, so you make your way to Emon, then you charter a ship across the Ozmit Sea and make your way to the continent of Marquet. On the northeast base of the Aggrad Mountains of Marquet, which consume a sizable portion of the continent's north shore, there before you stands, as it comes across the horizon, a brilliant crescent-shaped bay of white sands, glittering clear turquoise-colored waters, and the grandiose port city of Shamal.
trigger_phrase: you make your way to Emon

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Barely any hair on this body. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh! All right, and as you guys-- the ball is complete, you've all gathered. Your hangovers have faded. You all begin your trek toward the Bay of Gifts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are we sailing or are we bamfing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's up to you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to sail. I need a vacation.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sings) Sailing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sing) Takes me away, to where I've always---

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A little nostalgia in that for you, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Because I've sailed there before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And we didn't go sailing with Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Teach us some sailing songs. It will be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll teach you the ropes. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bah-derr.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And show us all the best gifs.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll show you all the best jifs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's okay too. That's okay too.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, just kidding. I don't say that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Hundreds of ships fill the bay, from small fishing vessels to massive cargo ships, bringing an ever-flowing mixture of cultures, goods, and characters from across Exandria to its sunny location. Now, while back home Winter's Crest brings seasonal rain and snow, here in the Bay of Gifts the sky is clear, the water is warm, and the sun is ever-shining throughout the day. The streets of the city are draped in white and gold silks, affixed and framing crossways and street corners between torch posts and buildings. The distant sound of waves and seagulls cawing seems to envelop the city at all hours, occasionally stemmed by the sounds of localized musicians. So as you arrived here about midday or so, you take in the nice salty air into your lungs. You have your belongings, your sacks at your side, the city is bustling. What do you want to do with your vacation?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sings) Shamal. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Holy crap.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: God damn it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, man.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You spend the next hour asking from person to person on these white sands.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All the way up to the head this time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Up to the neck. You feel the sunburn is starting to kick in a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) I need that helmet, Doty! My helm, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The giant reflective piece of metal?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're going to cook in that thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Tary."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean, "Tary?" (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where did it go?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Tary."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't tell me "Tary!" Your number one job is to take care of me, and your number two job is to take care of my belongings! That stuff is worth more than you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Tary."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, just get me out of the hole.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (impact noise)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: By your head.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ow!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I hand him a seashell. I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go find my armor. I'm going to go look around for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a survival check, because you're now tracking.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Survival? Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no. That's a four, so that's three. I'm a negative one for survival. I thought it was 11.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Over the course of the evening, the room gets cleaned as best as it can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your things are being brought out in pieces, but the two employees see Doty enter and set them down and Doty starts picking things up and dusts them off. Starts picking up the piles of dog feces.

preceding_turns.text: Tary, call him off.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Call him off.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Call him off.

preceding_turns.text: He's cleaning your things.

preceding_turns.text: He's throwing the dung out onto the beach. Starts heading back.

preceding_turns.text: I don't think he's very sanitary.

preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is how I have to talk with it. I have to dangle it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know you have to fiddle your dangle. I'm well aware.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll be right there to give him more specific instructions.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're going to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm coming.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you improve the reception by moving it around?
